# GPU-based HMSC modelling with updated dataset

```{r load_libraries, comment="", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(Hmsc)
library(ape)
```

```{r load_data, comment="", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
load("resources/hmsc.Rdata")

m <- model_list$model.red
save(m, file = "hmsc/model_red")

m <- model_list$model.grey
save(m, file = "hmsc/model_grey")
```

## In the HPC

### Red squirrels in parallel

```{sh}
conda activate hmsc-hpc

model="hmsc/model_red"
init="init/model_red.rds"

export samples=250
export thin=100
export transient=$(( samples * thin ))
export nChains=4
export verbose=TRUE
export model
export init

# Get initiation object
Rscript hmsc.r $model $init
```

```{sh}
cat <<'EOF' > launch_model_red.sh
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --job-name=hmsc_model_red
#SBATCH --array=0-3
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --ntasks=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=1
#SBATCH --partition=gpuqueue
#SBATCH --qos=normal
#SBATCH --gres=gpu:1
#SBATCH --mem=32gb
#SBATCH --time=120:00:00

# Activate conda environment
source activate hmsc-hpc

# Set output files
output=$(printf "output/hmsc_model_red_chain_%.2d.rds" $SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID)
mkdir output

# Run model fit
srun python3 -m hmsc.run_gibbs_sampler --input $init --output $output --samples $samples --transient $transient --thin $thin --verbose 100 --chains $SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
EOF
```

```{sh}
sbatch launch_model_red.sh
```

### Grey squirrels in parallel

```{sh}
conda activate hmsc-hpc

model="hmsc/model_grey"
init="init/model_grey.rds"

export samples=250
export thin=100
export transient=$(( samples * thin ))
export nChains=4
export verbose=TRUE
export model
export init

# Get initiation object
Rscript hmsc.r $model $init
```

```{sh}
cat <<'EOF' > launch_model_grey.sh
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --job-name=hmsc_model_grey
#SBATCH --array=0-3
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --ntasks=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=1
#SBATCH --partition=gpuqueue
#SBATCH --qos=normal
#SBATCH --gres=gpu:1
#SBATCH --mem=32gb
#SBATCH --time=120:00:00

# Activate conda environment
source activate hmsc-hpc

# Set output files
output=$(printf "output/hmsc_model_grey_chain_%.2d.rds" $SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID)
mkdir output

# Run model fit
srun python3 -m hmsc.run_gibbs_sampler --input $init --output $output --samples $samples --transient $transient --thin $thin --verbose 100 --chains $SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
EOF
```

```{sh}
sbatch launch_model_grey.sh
```
